channel.title: Optional on Bazlur's Stream of Thoughts
channel.description: Recent content in Optional on Bazlur's Stream of Thoughts

item.title: Let's use Optional to fix our method contract.
item.description: A method is a contract; When we define one, we put our thoughts into it. We specify the parameters, return type and their type. When we invoke a method, we expect it to behave according to the contract. If it doesn’t, it’s a violation of the contract. We have been dealing with such a violation all the time. We invoke a method with its proper arguments, and we get a return.
